title: URGD - Cinematic ModPack
description: A modpack that makes Minecraft ultra-realistic with enhanced shaders, textures, and lighting while staying optimized.
body:
![urgd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4fee39dc24c956a2ddab03fd5daa099824e317b.jpeg)

### ABOUT

**URGD Modpack is a carefully crafted Fabric modpack focused on delivering a fully immersive and high-performance Minecraft experience. With stunning visuals, high-quality shaders, realistic sound, and smooth FPS, this modpack is built for players who want next-level realism without lag.**

### FEATURES

**URGD Modpack includes powerful performance mods like Sodium, Indium, and FerriteCore to boost FPS, while immersive mods like Ambient Sounds and Presence Footsteps add life to your gameplay. Visuals are enhanced with popular shaders including BSL, Complementary Reimagined, Kappa, AstraLex, and more. It also includes resource packs such as Patrix 32x and Urban128x to take the environment to a whole new level. Whether you're exploring, building, or recording content, URGD ensures smooth performance and stunning quality across all areas of gameplay.**

### BUGS

**If you find any bugs or issues, please report them on our Discord server by creating a ticket under the bug category. Your feedback helps us improve the URGD Modpack faster and makes a big difference to the entire experience.**


### LICENSE

**URGD Modpack includes third-party mods, shaders, and resource packs. All included assets follow their respective licenses, and full credits are provided in the "credits.txt" file inside the ZIP. This pack is distributed strictly for personal and educational use.**


### CREDITS

**Credits File**: [View full credits](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1M0IBXkzQRQCYa0oCgjUrA6IIiZkZl7XT/view?usp=sharing)
